header.select_language_desc: Please choose the display language you would like to use for the system.

errors.login_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
errors.register_failed: Registration failed. Please try again later.
errors.unknown: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.invalid_username_format: Username must be lowercase and contain only letters and numbers (no spaces, no accents)

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your personal information and security settings

basic_info.title: Basic Information
basic_info.username_note: Username can only contain lowercase letters and numbers (e.g., anhkiet123)

wallet.title: Receiving Wallet
wallet.note: This address will be used to receive commissions and withdraw funds to your personal wallet.

bank.title: Bank Accounts
bank.added_note: Account added to temporary list. Click Save Changes to update.

security_tab.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
security_tab.desc: Protect your account by adding an extra layer of security.

modal.title: Set up Google Authenticator
modal.step1: 1. Scan QR code with Authenticator app
modal.step2: 2. Enter 6-digit code from app to confirm
modal.secret_label: Secret Key (if QR code not working):

kyc.title: Account Verification
kyc.subtitle: Complete verification steps to increase limits and secure your account.

id_verification.note: Our team will review your information within 24-48 working hours.

facescan.title: Face Verification
facescan.desc: You need to complete Step 1 before performing face scan.
facescan.standard: Powered by FaceTec 3D Liveness technology for accuracy.

google_auth.title: Google Authenticator
google_auth.desc: Use Google Authenticator app to get security codes.
google_auth.instructions: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator app to enable 2FA.

kyc.security_note_desc: We are committed to absolute security of your personal information. KYC data is used only for identification purposes as required by regulations.

pre_register.title: AQE Pre-Register
pre_register.subtitle: Own AQE Tokens early with special prices and earn attractive referral bonuses
pre_register.comm_note: * Commissions will be added to your USDT balance immediately upon referral payment.
pre_register.ref_card_desc: Share your link and earn 10% commission (8% F1 + 2% F2)
pre_register.pay_completed_msg: Congratulations! You have fulfilled 100% of your payment obligation for this campaign.
pre_register.connect_to_pay_hint: Please connect your wallet to pay
pre_register.kyc_verified_required: KYC verification is required for pre-registration

assets.title: My Assets
assets.subtitle: Manage your USDT and AQE balances in your account

withdraw_dialog.title: Withdraw USDT
withdraw_dialog.desc: You will withdraw your entire available balance to your registered BEP20 wallet address.
withdraw_dialog.note: Note: Withdrawals under 200 USDT will be processed automatically. Amounts over 200 USDT require manual approval by Admin within 24 hours.
withdraw_dialog.no_wallet_desc: You need to update your USDT (BEP20) wallet address in settings before making a withdrawal.
withdraw_dialog.insufficient_balance: Insufficient USDT balance to complete this transaction

kyc_callback.failed_desc: Face verification failed or was cancelled.
kyc_callback.redirect_note: System will redirect automatically in a few seconds...
kyc_callback.process_error: An error occurred while processing the result.

referrals.title: Referral System
referrals.subtitle: Invite friends and earn commissions from AQEstate

errors.cannot_change_pledge: You cannot change the pledge amount after payment has been made
errors.kyc_required: You need to complete and have Step 1 KYC approved to make a payment
errors.min_first_payment: The first payment must be at least 30% ({{minAmount}} USDT)
